name: @seawall/dashboard
comment: v2 ISLAND. @mysten/deepbook-v3 + @mysten/dapp-kit peer-require @mysten/sui v2, so the whole dashboard lives on v2. It imports ONLY @seawall/shared (pure TS) and talks HTTP/SSE to the v1 agent — never imports the agent/keeper. The benign deepbook peer warning on install is expected.
